treatment_information.specific_treatment: Emergency repair of acute type A dissection with ascending aortic and hemi arch replacement with a 24 mm Gelweave graft and aortic valve resuspension
Right iliac segment fenestration and placement of a 14 and a 12 mm Protege stent for malperfusion caused by aortoiliac dissection
Bovine patch closure repair of right femoral arteriotomy
Debridement of muscle, right anterior and lateral compartments

treatment_timeline.event: Emergency surgery performed for type A aortic dissection
Right iliac segment fenestration and stent placement for malperfusion
Debridement of muscle and VAC dressing placement performed

patient_outcome.final_status: Alert and oriented x3, ambulatory but deconditioned
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Patient has follow-up appointment with the surgeon
patient_outcome.complications: Compartment syndrome and limb ischemia noted
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient experiencing sternal pain managed with oral analgesics
